_meta.note: Expanded action/resource icon set (v2), extending icons_v1.json. Same asset_type (game_icons), styles and brand_doom theme as icons_v1 so the two sets read as one system. Native format is YAML; generate_images.py --file parses this JSON via yaml.safe_load. Dry-run: python tools/assets/generate_images.py --file tools/assets/manifests/icons_v2.json --dry-run. See docs/art/ASSET_PIPELINE.md.
_meta.grounding: Icon ids/intent grounded in godot/scripts/core/game_state.gd (resources) and godot/data/actions/*.json (action menu ids: hire_staff, buy_compute, safety_research, capability_research, publish_paper, fundraise, publicity, team_building, audit_safety, operations, strategic, travel, financing, lobby_government, media_campaign, open_source_release, acquire_startup, sabotage_competitor, emergency_pivot). New resources beyond icons_v1's 6: research, action_points, stationery/supplies, technical_debt, morale.

styles.global_icon_base: bold flat vector game icon, single centred symbol, one heavy and consistent stroke weight throughout, strong chunky silhouette that reads clearly at 64x64, flat-ish shading with a single light source (no gradients or painterly rendering), transparent background, no text, no scene, no background props, view-locked straight-on and symmetrical, centered composition
styles.brand_palette: limited palette drawn from the P(Doom)1 hero image only: deep indigo #181b3b and #2e2547, lit indigo #383761, doom-purple #300e1c and #351b33, doom-magenta #2c1327, near-black ink #0e020c for shadow, plus a single thin warm bone keyline #ece0cf for edge legibility; no other hues, no white fills except the keyline

brand_doom.color_bias: cohesive doom-end brand set: indigo and doom-purple bodies, ink shadow, one glowing accent per icon, bone keyline for the outline so every icon reads as one system

assets.prompt_tail: a bold head-and-shoulders person silhouette with a single small plus sign badge at the upper right signalling recruitment, symmetrical and centred, no chair, no desk; figure in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c inner shadow, the plus glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a single chunky GPU / compute rack-blade with parallel cooling fins and one glowing power node, with a small downward acquisition arrow beside it signalling a purchase, hard industrial rectangular silhouette, explicitly NOT a flat microchip square; blade in indigo #181b3b and #2e2547, fins in ink #0e020c, power node and arrow glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold shield with a magnifier lens centred over it signalling careful safety review of research, symmetrical and centred; shield in indigo #2e2547, lens ring glowing lit-indigo #383761, ink #0e020c inner shadow, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a stylised angular brain-chip hybrid (a brain fused with circuit traces) with a single steep upward arrow behind it signalling advancing and risky capability, faintly menacing, symmetrical and centred; body in doom-purple #300e1c and #351b33, ink #0e020c shadow, arrow and circuit traces glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a single research-paper sheet with a couple of abstract text-lines and a bold check-seal or upward publish arrow at its corner signalling a paper being sent out to the world, distinct from a passive stack, centred; sheet faced bone #ece0cf over an indigo #181b3b backing, ink #0e020c outline, the seal/arrow glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone keyline

an open hand from below cupping a single rising coin with a small upward funding arrow, signalling raising money, bold rounded silhouette, no dollar-sign text; hand and coin in doom-purple #351b33 with ink #0e020c edges, coin face and arrow glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold megaphone / bullhorn angled up-right with two short broadcast arcs signalling public outreach, chunky silhouette, centred; horn body in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, broadcast arcs glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

three bold head-and-shoulders figures overlapping shoulder to shoulder as a unified team block signalling morale and cohesion, symmetrical and centred; figures in indigo #2e2547 and #181b3b with ink #0e020c separation shadows, the centre figure rim-lit glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold clipboard with a checklist of three ticked rows and a small magnifier overlapping one corner signalling a thorough safety audit, centred; clipboard in indigo #2e2547, ticked marks and magnifier ring glowing lit-indigo #383761, ink #0e020c shadow, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a single bold cog / gear with a smaller inset gear tooth-locked inside it signalling routine operations and maintenance, perfectly symmetrical and centred; gear in doom-indigo #2e2547 with a #383761 rim-light on the top teeth, ink #0e020c hub shadow, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold chess knight piece on a short plinth signalling high-stakes strategic play, symmetrical and centred; knight in doom-purple #300e1c and #351b33 with ink #0e020c base shadow, a single #383761 rim-light along the mane edge, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold conference lectern / speaking podium with a small paper-plane travel motif arcing above it signalling academic travel and conference talks, centred; podium in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, the paper-plane glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold coin bound by a short chain link signalling financing with strings attached (loans and obligations), centred; coin in doom-purple #351b33 with ink #0e020c edges, the chain link glowing lit-indigo #383761 as the warning accent, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold neoclassical government building facade (pediment on columns) with a small gavel motif in front signalling lobbying for regulation, symmetrical and centred; building in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow between columns, the gavel glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold broadcast tower / antenna mast emitting three concentric signal arcs signalling a press and social-media campaign, symmetrical and centred; mast in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, signal arcs glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold open padlock with a small three-node share / branch glyph inside the shackle signalling releasing safety tools openly to the community, centred; padlock body in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, the open shackle and share-nodes glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold small startup building with a rocket-fin roof being drawn in by a downward acquisition arrow / bracket around it signalling buying a struggling startup for talent and compute, centred; building in doom-purple #351b33 with ink #0e020c shadow, the acquisition arrow glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold domino-style masquerade mask over a single cracked gear signalling unethical and risky corporate espionage, faintly sinister, symmetrical and centred; mask in doom-purple #300e1c and #351b33 with ink #0e020c shadow, the crack glowing a cold lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold U-turn / reversing arrow curving hard back on itself with a small alert-triangle notch signalling an emergency pivot from capability to safety, centred; arrow in doom-purple #351b33 with ink #0e020c shadow, the arrowhead and alert notch glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold laboratory flask whose contents form a small glowing insight-node lattice (a few connected dots) rising from it signalling accumulated research output distinct from published papers, symmetrical and centred; flask in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, the node lattice glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

three bold rounded energy pips arranged in a tight triangle signalling action points / attention available this turn, symmetrical and centred, no numerals; pips in indigo #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, the top pip fully lit and glowing lit-indigo #383761 while the other two are dimmer, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold cup / holder of office stationery (a couple of pens and a paperclip) signalling restockable office supplies, chunky silhouette, centred; holder in indigo #181b3b and #2e2547 with ink #0e020c shadow, one pen-tip glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold tangled knot of cables over a cracked block signalling accumulating technical debt, faintly unstable, symmetrical and centred; cables and block in doom-purple #300e1c and #351b33 with ink #0e020c shadow, the crack-line glowing a warning lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline

a bold heart with a single rising pulse / heartbeat line across it signalling team morale, symmetrical and centred, no cuteness; heart in doom-purple #351b33 with ink #0e020c inner shadow, the pulse line glowing lit-indigo #383761, thin bone #ece0cf keyline
